description:
Create a Fishbone (Ishikawa / Cause-and-Effect) diagram in EdrawMax documenting the root causes of an 'Online Banking System Outage'. 

The diagram must feature the effect 'Online Banking System Outage' and include the following six categories with their specific sub-causes:
- People: 'Insufficient on-call staffing', 'Operator skipped deployment checklist', 'New hire lacked production access training'
- Process: 'No rollback procedure documented', 'Change approval bypassed for urgent fix', 'Monitoring alerts not routed to correct team'
- Technology: 'Database connection pool exhausted', 'Load balancer failover misconfigured', 'TLS certificate expired on API gateway'
- Environment: 'Data center cooling failure raised server temps', 'Cloud region capacity limits reached', 'DNS propagation delay after provider switch'
- Management: 'Incident response budget cut by 30%', 'Post-mortem actions from prior outage not tracked', 'No disaster recovery drill in 18 months'
- Measurement: 'SLA breach detection delayed by 45 minutes', 'Capacity metrics dashboard stale for 2 weeks', 'Error rate threshold set too high to trigger alert'

Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/fishbone_outage_rca.eddx and export it as a PNG image to /home/ga/Diagrams/fishbone_outage_rca.png.
